_comment: Real-SHAPE OpenAI Responses API payload for a P6 tuning PROPOSE call — proposes one bounded correction cut and one preference (target) move. Hand-authored to the wire shape; scripts/tuning-llm-live-check.py overwrites it with a real captured response. Tests parse it exactly as model_client does — no paid call.

content.text: {"artifact_schema_version":2,"kind":"jts_advisor_response","summary":"The 62 Hz mode is still slightly above target after the current cut. I suggest a marginally deeper cut there. Separately, if you like a fuller low end, a warm target is worth auditioning.","recommended_next_action":"Try the deeper 62 Hz cut, then verify.","action_plan":[{"type":"propose_correction_peq_adjustment","message":"","reason":"","position_hint":"","rationale":"A slightly deeper cut at the 62 Hz mode to bring it fully to target.","profile_name":"","profile":{"enabled":false,"curve_id":"flat","simple_eq":{"sub_bass_db":0,"bass_db":0,"mid_db":0,"presence_db":0,"treble_db":0},"parametric_bands":[]},"correction_peqs":[{"freq_hz":62.0,"q":3.0,"gain_db":-7.5}],"target_id":"","warmth":0.0},{"type":"propose_target_move","message":"","reason":"","position_hint":"","rationale":"You mentioned wanting more warmth; a warm house curve tilts gently toward the low end.","profile_name":"","profile":{"enabled":false,"curve_id":"flat","simple_eq":{"sub_bass_db":0,"bass_db":0,"mid_db":0,"presence_db":0,"treble_db":0},"parametric_bands":[]},"correction_peqs":[],"target_id":"warm","warmth":0.0}]}
